PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?result
WHERE
{
  ?result pv:hasCategory <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/prod-cat-Encoder> .
  ?result pv:price ?priceR .
  ?priceR pv:amount ?price .
  ?result pv:hasSupplier ?supplier .
  ?supplier pv:addressCountry ?country .
  FILTER ( (?country = "France") ||  (?country = "Germany") )
}
ORDER BY ASC(?price)
LIMIT 1
generated: SELECT ?encoder WHERE { ?encoder a :Encoder; :price ?price; :supplier ?supplier. ?supplier :country ?country. FILTER(?country IN ("France", "Germany")) } ORDER BY ASC(?price) LIMIT 1

golden:
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?result
WHERE
{
  ?result pv:hasCategory <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/prod-cat-Coil> .
  ?result pv:width_mm ?width_mm .
  ?result pv:depth_mm ?depth_mm .
  ?result pv:height_mm ?height_mm .
  ?result pv:weight_g ?weight_g .
  BIND(?width_mm * ?depth_mm * ?height_mm / 1000000000 AS ?volume_m3)
  BIND(?weight_g / 1000 AS ?weight_kg)
  BIND(?weight_kg / ?volume_m3 AS ?density)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?density)
LIMIT 1
generated: SELECT ?coil WHERE { ?coil a :Coil; :density ?density. } ORDER BY DESC(?density) LIMIT 1

golden:
PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

ASK
WHERE {
  { # all BOMs with parts from russia
    SELECT ?bom
    WHERE {
      ?bom pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .
      ?bomPart pv:hasPart ?hw .
      ?hw pv:hasSupplier ?suppl .
      ?suppl pv:addressCountry ?country .
      FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(?country), LCASE("Russia")))
    }
  }

  # services eligible for parts associated with these BOMs?
  ?s a pv:Service .
  ?s pv:eligibleFor ?hw .
  ?bom pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .
  ?bomPart pv:hasPart ?hw .
}

generated: SELECT ?supplierName ?country ?price WHERE { ?item a :Hardware . ?item :price ?price . ?item :deliveredBy ?supplier . ?supplier :name ?supplierName . ?supplier :country ?country } ORDER BY DESC(?price) OFFSET 5 LIMIT 5

SELECT ?departmentName (COUNT(?employee) AS ?numberOfEmployees) WHERE { ?department a :Department ; :name ?departmentName ; :hasEmployee ?employee . } GROUP BY ?departmentName HAVING (COUNT(?employee) > 5)

SELECT ?category ?lightestItem ?heaviestItem WHERE { { SELECT ?category (MIN(?weight) AS ?minWeight) (MAX(?weight) AS ?maxWeight) WHERE { ?item a :HardwareItem; :category ?category; :weight ?weight. } GROUP BY ?category } { SELECT ?category ?lightestItem WHERE { ?lightestItem a :HardwareItem; :category ?category; :weight ?weight. } HAVING (MIN(?weight) = ?minWeight) } { SELECT ?category ?heaviestItem WHERE { ?heaviestItem a :HardwareItem; :category ?category; :weight ?weight. } HAVING (MAX(?weight) = ?maxWeight) } }

SELECT ?supplierName ?street ?city ?postalCode ?country WHERE { ?supplier a :Supplier . ?supplier :name ?supplierName . ?supplier :hasAddress ?address . OPTIONAL { ?address :street ?street . } OPTIONAL { ?address :city ?city . } OPTIONAL { ?address :postalCode ?postalCode . } OPTIONAL { ?address :country ?country . } }

generated: SELECT ?expertiseArea (GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ?skill; separator=", ") AS ?topSkills) WHERE { ?product :hasExpertiseArea ?expertiseArea . ?expertiseArea :hasSkill ?skill . } GROUP BY ?expertiseArea ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(DISTINCT ?skill)) LIMIT 1

golden:
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?bom (COUNT(?part) AS ?partCount) (SUM(?qty) AS ?totalQty)
WHERE {
  ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
    pv:hasBomPart ?part .
  ?part pv:quantity ?qty_ .
  BIND(xsd:int(?qty_) AS ?qty)
}
GROUP BY ?bom
HAVING (SUM(?qty) > 600)
ORDER BY DESC(SUM(?qty))
generated: SELECT ?bom (COUNT(?part) AS ?partCount) (SUM(?quantity) AS ?totalQuantity) WHERE { ?bom a :BillOfMaterial; :containsPart ?part. ?part :materialQuantity ?quantity. } GROUP BY ?bom HAVING (SUM(?quantity) > 600) ORDER BY DESC(?totalQuantity)

SELECT ?employee ?name ?email ?phone ?department ?directReport WHERE { ?employee a :Employee . OPTIONAL { ?employee :name ?name } OPTIONAL { ?employee :email ?email } OPTIONAL { ?employee :phone ?phone } OPTIONAL { ?employee :belongsToDepartment ?department } OPTIONAL { ?employee :directReport ?directReport } }

SELECT ?manager (100.0 * ?sameDeptCount / ?totalTeam AS ?percentage) WHERE { { SELECT ?manager (COUNT(?teamMember) AS ?totalTeam) WHERE { ?manager :manages ?teamMember. } GROUP BY ?manager } { SELECT ?manager (COUNT(?teamMember) AS ?sameDeptCount) WHERE { ?manager :manages ?teamMember. ?manager :worksIn ?dept. ?teamMember :worksIn ?dept. } GROUP BY ?manager } FILTER(?totalTeam > 0) }
SELECT ?bom (AVG(?unitCost) AS ?averageUnitCost) WHERE { ?bom :hasPart ?part . ?part :type :HardwarePart . ?part :unitCost ?unitCost . } GROUP BY ?bom ORDER BY DESC(?averageUnitCost) LIMIT 1

SELECT ?hardwareID ?name ?width WHERE { ?hardware a :HardwareItem; :hasID ?hardwareID; :hasName ?name; :hasWidth ?width. { SELECT ?width (COUNT(?w) AS ?rank) WHERE { ?item a :HardwareItem; :hasWidth ?w. } GROUP BY ?width ORDER BY DESC(?width) } FILTER(?rank <= (CEIL((SELECT (COUNT(?x) AS ?total) WHERE { ?x a :HardwareItem; :hasWidth ?y. }) * 0.1))) } ORDER BY DESC(?width)
